name: harmonia
description: Discord TTS bot with queueing, revealable speech activity posts, and Edge/Piper speech support.

DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN.description: Discord bot token from the Developer Portal.

GUILD_ID.description: Optional test server ID for faster slash-command deploys.

ENABLE_MESSAGE_CONTENT_INTENT.description: Enable only if you also enable the Message Content privileged intent in Discord.

ENABLE_HTTP_SERVER.description: Enable the HTTP dashboard and /health routes. Leave false for a worker-only Heroku bot.

DATA_DIR.description: Optional writable directory for settings and history. Heroku dyno storage is ephemeral.

PIPER_INSTALL_DIR.description: Directory where Piper should be installed during build.

PIPER_PATH.description: Path to the Piper binary in the dyno slug.

PIPER_MODEL_DIR.description: Directory containing Piper voice models in the dyno slug.

PIPER_MODEL_MANIFEST.description: JSON manifest describing Piper voice model downloads.
